title: Necrotising fasciitis - NHS
text:
rough:
cuts and scratches burns and scalds insect bites surgery injecting drugs You may be more at risk from developing necrotising fasciitis if you have diabetes or a weakened immune system.
Page last reviewed: 20 June 2022
Next review due: 20 June 2025
